description: Discover the perfect balance of style, technology, and capability with the 2024 Nissan Rogue S. description: Discover the exceptional 2023 Chevrolet Bolt EUV LT in the stunning Ice Blue Metallic color. This one-owner, CARFAX-certified electric vehicle offers a remarkable blend of style, technology, and efficiency, making it the perfect choice for the discerning driver.  Highlighted features include:  CARFAX Certified  Extended Service Contract Available  Remainder of Factory Warranty  Preferred Equipment Group 2LT  Immerse yourself in the premium audio experience with the 6-speaker system, SiriusXM radio with 360L, and the Chevrolet Infotainment 3 Plus system. Stay connected with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, while the SD card receptacle allows you to personalize your entertainment.  Comfort and convenience are paramount in this Bolt EUV. Enjoy the benefits of automatic temperature control, a rear window defroster, and power windows. The remote keyless entry and steering wheel-mounted audio controls add to the overall ease of use.  Safety is a top priority, with features like ABS brakes, dual front impact airbags, dual front side impact airbags, and an emergency communication system. The Bolt EUV also boasts electronic stability control, a rear side impact airbag, and a brake assist system for added peace of mind.  Elevate your driving experience with the performance-tuned ride and handling suspension, as well as the Auto High-beam Headlights and Delay-off headlights for enhanced visibility.  Discover the perfect balance of style, technology, and efficiency in the 2023 Chevrolet Bolt EUV LT. This exceptional electric vehicle is waiting to take you on an unforgettable journey. description: Discover the perfect blend of capability, style, and technology in the 2024 Subaru Crosstrek Limited. description: Elevate your driving experience with the 2024 Toyota Prius XLE, a remarkable hybrid that seamlessly blends efficiency, style, and cutting-edge technology. This exceptional vehicle is a true testament to Toyota's commitment to innovation and sustainability.  Boasting a comprehensive array of premium features, the Prius XLE is designed to enhance your every journey. Key highlights include:   Panoramic Fixed Glass Roof  Wireless Digital Key with Smart Door Lock  Heated Sport Front Bucket Seats  Heated Steering Wheel  19" Alloy Wheels  Exterior Parking Camera Rear  Auto High-beam Headlights  Brake Assist  Electronic Stability Control  Emergency Assistance Kit  Powered by a 2.0L 4-Cylinder DOHC 16V VVT engine paired with a Continuously Variable (ECVT) transmission and an all-wheel-drive system, the Prius XLE delivers an exceptional fuel economy of 49 MPG in the city and 50 MPG on the highway. This remarkable efficiency not only saves you money at the pump but also reduces your carbon footprint, making it a responsible choice for the environmentally conscious driver.  Step inside the Prius XLE and experience the epitome of modern, sophisticated design. The spacious and well-appointed cabin, featuring SofTex seat trim and a 12.3" Toyota Audio Multimedia System, provides a truly premium driving experience. Enjoy the convenience of features like the Wireless Digital Key, which allows you to lock, unlock, and start your vehicle with the touch of a button, and the Panoramic Fixed Glass Roof, which floods the interior with natural light and enhances the sense of openness.  Safety is of the utmost importance, and the Prius XLE delivers with a comprehensive suite of advanced safety features. From the Dual Front Impact Airbags and Occupant Sensing Airbag to the Rear Side Impact Airbag and Electronic Stability Control, you can rest assured that you and your passengers are well-protected.  Elevate your driving experience and make a statement with the 2024 Toyota Prius XLE. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you. Predictive brake assist - Be prepared for your big brake. Predictive brake assist monitors the available distance in front of you compared to your vehicles speed.  If your speed exceeds the required distance to stop short of a collision, it readies your brakes to apply maximum stopping force when you use them.  Predictive brake assist helps see to it that you stop.Technology and Telematics Wireless Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. This remarkable SUV combines cutting-edge technology, uncompromising performance, and a refined, sophisticated design to deliver a driving experience that is truly in a class of its own.   Navigation system: Drive Connect (3 year trial) includes Cloud Navigation with real time traffic and Google POI  12.3" Toyota Audio Multimedia w/6 Speakers  Automatic temperature control  Power driver seat  Four wheel independent suspension  Dual front impact airbags  Emergency communication system: Safety Connect (10-year trial)  Power Liftgate  Auto High-beam Headlights  Apple CarPlay/Android Auto  Boasting an impressive all-electric range of up to 107 miles per gallon on the highway and 131 miles per gallon in the city, the bZ4X XLE delivers exceptional efficiency and sustainability without compromising on power or performance. Its sleek, aerodynamic exterior and sophisticated cabin design exude a sense of modern elegance, while the advanced safety and technology features ensure a driving experience that is both thrilling and secure.  Imagine effortlessly gliding through city streets or conquering winding roads, all while enjoying the serene quietness and instant responsiveness of the electric motor. The bZ4X XLE's single-speed automatic transmission and front-wheel-drive configuration provide a smooth, seamless ride, allowing you to focus on the journey ahead.  Stepping inside the bZ4X XLE, you'll be greeted by a spacious and well-appointed interior, complete with premium materials and thoughtful amenities. The 12.3-inch Toyota Audio Multimedia system with 6 speakers provides an immersive entertainment experience, while the automatic climate control and power driver's seat ensure your comfort is uncompromised.  Safety is of the utmost importance in the bZ4X XLE, and this vehicle is equipped with a comprehensive suite of advanced safety features. From the dual front impact airbags and emergency communication system to the rear-view camera and electronic stability control, you can drive with confidence, knowing that you and your passengers are well-protected.  As you explore the exceptional features and capabilities of the 2024 Toyota bZ4X XLE, we invite you to experience the future of driving for yourself. Visit our showroom and let our knowledgeable team guide you through this remarkable electric SUV. description: This  2024 Chevrolet Trailblazer RS, has a Nitro Yellow Metallic exterior and Jet Black with Red accents interior color with only 0 miles. New brake pads and rotors! Stock Number PL6097. You can connect  with us by calling (518) 241-3901.       No Accidents!  One Owner!    OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:  Convenience Package ($1,195 value)Single-Zone Auto Climate Control Air ConditioningInside Rearview Auto-Dimming MirrorDriver and Front Passenger Illuminated Vanity MirrorsWireless Charging120-Volt Power OutletHands-Free Power Programmable Liftgate1 type-A and 1 type-C USB Charging-Only PortsDriver Confidence Package ($395 value)Rear Park AssistRear Cross Traffic AlertLane Change Alert with Side Blind Zone AlertPreferred Equipment Group 1RS    Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.Technology and Telematics Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. description: 2024 Honda CR-V LX | 190HP Turbo, Apple CarPlay, Honda Sensing  The Modern Efficiency Leader for Gainesville!  New 2024 Honda CR-V LX for sale in Gainesville, FL. Reimagined 6th-generation SUV featuring a 1.5L Turbocharged Engine, 7-inch Touchscreen, LED Headlights, and Adaptive Cruise Control. The smart, high-value choice for UF students, healthcare professionals at Shands, and anyone commuting from Alachua or Jonesville.   Vehicle Description: All-New Rugged Style for the Gator Nation The 2024 Honda CR-V LX proves that "base model" doesn't mean "basic." Completely redesigned with a bolder, more aggressive stance, the 2024 LX delivers the perfect mix of Hondas legendary reliability and modern tech. Whether youre finding a spot near the UF Bat Houses, navigating the weekend traffic at Butler Town Center, or heading south for a hike at Paynes Prairie, the CR-V LX provides a smooth, confident ride thats built for the North Florida lifestyle.  Why the LX is the High-Value Pick in the 352:  Punchy Turbocharged Performance: Don't let the efficiency fool youthe standard 1.5L Turbocharged engine delivers a responsive 190 horsepower. It provides plenty of "get-up-and-go" for merging onto I-75 at Archer Road or passing on Newberry Road, all while maintaining an impressive EPA-estimated 34 MPG on the highway.   Tech-Ready Cabin: Stay connected on your way to Celebration Pointe with the 7-inch color touchscreen featuring Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. Its the perfect interface for your GPS or for streaming "Gator Tales" podcasts during your morning commute.  Massive Cargo Versatility: With 39.3 cu. ft. of space behind the rear seats (expanding to a huge 76.5 cu. ft. with seats folded), the CR-V LX is a hauling pro. Its ready for everything from a massive Publix run to UF move-in day or loading up gear for a day at Ginnie Springs. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-off cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now with hands-off cruise control simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles with minimal steering input from you. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. description: Discover the 2024 Jeep Compass Latitude, a versatile SUV that combines rugged capability with modern technology and comfort. With just under 12,000 miles, this used vehicle is finished in a striking Bright White Clearcoat exterior complemented by a sleek black interior, offering a fresh and stylish look. Powered by a turbocharged 2.0-liter four-cylinder engine producing 200 horsepower and 221 lb-ft of torque, this Compass delivers confident performance paired with impressive fuel efficiency24 mpg city and 32 mpg highway. Equipped with an 8-speed automatic transmission and standard 4WD, this vehicle is prepared for a variety of adventures, whether on city streets or off-road terrains. Its spacious four-door design comfortably seats five, making it an ideal choice for families or those seeking practicality without sacrificing style.This Jeep Compass Latitude is packed with a suite of advanced features designed to enhance your driving experience. Stay connected and entertained with Apple CarPlay, Bluetooth, and SiriusXM Satellite Radio readiness, while the 10.1-inch infotainment touchscreen offers intuitive control over your media and navigation. The vehicle includes a backup camera, blind spot monitor, cross traffic alert, and collision warning systems to keep you safe on the road. Convenience is at your fingertips with keyless entry, push start, and a Wifi hotspot, ensuring seamless connectivity wherever your journey takes you. Additionally, driver-assist features such as lane keep assist and electronic messaging assistance with read and voice functions provide added safety and ease of use.2024 Jeep Compass Safety and Security FeaturesThis Compass Latitude prioritizes your safety with a comprehensive set of security features. It includes a rear seat reminder to alert you before exiting the vehicle, along with driver knee airbags and four-wheel ABS for enhanced crash protection. The vehicle also features auto-locking power door locks with anti-lockout capability, brake drying to maintain optimal braking performance in wet conditions, and an electronic parking brake with auto-off functionality, ensuring peace of mind in various driving situations.2024 Jeep Compass Entertainment and Technology FeaturesEntertainment and connectivity are central to this SUVs appeal. The Compass comes equipped with SiriusXM Guardian app compatibility, allowing smart device integration for remote engine start and vehicle management. The infotainment systems large 10.1-inch touch screen offers voice-activated hands-free calling, radio operation, and electronic messaging assistance with read and voice functions. Amazon Alexa compatibility further enhances connectivity, while a six-speaker audio system delivers clear, immersive sound. The vehicles user-friendly interface makes staying connected and entertained effortless on every drive.2024 Jeep Compass Performance FeaturesPerformance is a highlight of the 2024 Jeep Compass Latitude, featuring an eco-friendly auto start/stop system that optimizes fuel economy. description: WHY THIS VEHICLE?   This Galaxy Gray Metallic 2024 Chevrolet Equinox EV RS has an Black with Red Accents interior color. 16,301 miles.  Stock Number H1352   Important Package Information Preferred Equipment Group 2RSAll-Weather Liner Package ($325 value)All-Weather Cargo Area LinerContoured All-Weather Floor Liner Safety and Security The vehicle is equipped with a system that senses, and then prepares, the vehicle and/or occupants, for an impending forward collision. The vehicle constantly monitors the roadway in front of the vehicle and identifies and tracks pedestrians on an interior display. If the system determines a likely impact, it will automatically take preventative steps to avoid hitting the pedestrian. The vehicle is equipped with a camera that displays an image of the area behind the vehicle on an interior display. The vehicle is equipped with a system that senses, and then prepares, the vehicle and/or occupants, for an impending rear collision. Important Package and Feature Information  Cargo Net ($55 value)Wheel Locks ($65 value)Includes front and rear wheel locks.Cross Bars ($360 value)Ceramic Silver Paint ($495 value)Carpeted Floor Mats (8-Passenger) ($225 value)    Convenience GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. description: Discover the exceptional 2024 GMC Sierra 1500 SLT, a vehicle that seamlessly blends power, capability, and refined sophistication. This stunning truck is more than just a workhorse; it's a true companion that elevates your driving experience.  Equipped with a potent EcoTec3 5.3L V8 engine and a 10-speed automatic transmission, the Sierra 1500 SLT delivers impressive performance and efficiency, with an EPA-estimated 15 city/20 highway mpg. But this truck is more than just raw power  it's also designed to tackle any terrain with confidence, thanks to the X31 Off-Road and Protection Package, which includes:   20" Polished Aluminum Wheels  275/60R20 All-Terrain Tires  Spray-On Bedliner  All-Weather Floor Liners  The SLT Premium Plus Package further enhances your driving experience, offering a suite of advanced features such as:   SLT Convenience Package  SLT Preferred Package  Sierra Safety Plus Package  ProGrade Trailering System  Chrome Assist Steps  Spray-On Bedliner  Comfort and convenience are also top priorities in the 2024 Sierra 1500 SLT. Enjoy the luxury of heated and ventilated front seats, a power-sliding rear window, and a premium Bose 7-speaker sound system. Safety is paramount, and the Sierra 1500 SLT delivers with a comprehensive suite of advanced driver-assist technologies, including Automatic Emergency Braking, Forward Collision Alert, Lane Keep Assist with Lane Departure Warning, and Rear Cross Traffic Braking.  Whether you're tackling tough jobs, exploring the great outdoors, or simply seeking a refined and capable daily driver, the 2024 GMC Sierra 1500 SLT is the perfect choice. description: Experience the Thrill of Driving with the 2024 Nissan Sentra S: Sleek Design, Advanced Safety, and Unmatched Comfort for the Modern Urban Adventurer Step into the 2024 Nissan Sentra S, where sleek design meets advanced technology, offering an exceptional driving experience tailored for the modern urban adventurer. This used 4D sedan in Super Black exudes sophistication, with its aerodynamic lines and bold presence. Under the hood, the 2.0L I4 DOHC engine paired with a CVT with Xtronic transmission ensures a smooth and responsive ride, perfect for navigating city streets or cruising down the highway. Safety is paramount in the Sentra S, featuring a comprehensive suite of advanced safety technologies. Stay confident with Automatic Highbeams, Blind Spot Monitor, and Cross-Traffic Alert, while the Front Collision Mitigation and Lane Departure Warning systems provide peace of mind on every journey. description: Discover the perfect blend of style, performance, and versatility with the 2024 Volkswagen Tiguan 2.0T S. This exceptional SUV is the ultimate companion for your adventures, offering a dynamic driving experience and a wealth of premium features to enhance your daily commute. description: The 2024 Subaru Forester in Horizon Blue Pearl effortlessly combines style, performance, and practicality, making it an ideal choice for both urban and adventurous drivers. Its elegant exterior is complemented by sleek 17" alloy wheels and LED headlights, which include auto high beams for enhanced visibility. The robust All Wheel Drive system, powered by a 2.5L 4-Cylinder engine, ensures a smooth and confident driving experience across various terrains.  This Forester is not just about looks and performance; it also prioritizes safety with features like active cruise control and forward collision warning. Lane departure warning and lane keep assist provide added reassurance on the road by helping you maintain your intended path. Complete with a backup camera and keyless entry, this vehicle ensures convenience and security for everyday driving.  For those who love the great outdoors, the Forester comes equipped with a comprehensive range of adventure-ready features. The Thule rooftop tent, awning, and bike carrier cater to outdoor enthusiasts looking for exploration-ready gear. With the towing package and Thule cargo carrier - extended, you have ample space for all your travel essentials. Whether you're navigating city streets or exploring remote landscapes, the 2024 Subaru Forester is ready to accompany you on every journey.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Backup Camera, Tow Package, Alloy Wheel Package & Roof Rails, Gray, Cloth Upholstery, Horizon Blue Pearl, Wheels: 17'' X 7.0 J Silver Finish Aluminum-Alloy

description: Introducing the 2024 Ford F-150 STX, a rugged and capable pickup that's ready to take on any challenge. With its bold, confident styling and impressive performance, this truck is the perfect companion for your adventures.   Electronic Locking w/3.73 Axle Ratio  Integrated Trailer Brake Controller  Navigation System: Connected Navigation  Beneath the hood, you'll find a powerful 2.7L V6 EcoBoost engine, delivering an impressive 19 city/25 highway MPG. Paired with a smooth-shifting 10-speed automatic transmission, this powertrain provides the perfect balance of power and efficiency.  The F-150 STX is built to handle the toughest jobs with ease. With a GVWR of 6,365 lbs and a capable payload package, this truck can take on heavy-duty tasks with confidence. And with features like the integrated trailer brake controller, you can tow with ease, knowing your load is secure and under control.  But the F-150 STX isn't just about brute force  it's also packed with advanced technology to keep you connected and in control. The SYNC 4 infotainment system with enhanced voice recognition puts a world of information and entertainment at your fingertips, while the 911 Assist feature provides an added layer of safety and security.  Step inside the cabin, and you'll be greeted by a spacious and well-appointed interior, with features like power windows, remote keyless entry, and steering wheel-mounted audio controls. The split-folding rear seat and ample storage space make it easy to adapt to your needs, whether you're hauling gear or transporting passengers.  Wherever your adventures take you, the 2024 Ford F-150 STX is ready to lead the way. With its rugged good looks, impressive capabilities, and advanced technology, this truck is the perfect blend of power and practicality. description: DEALER DEMO -- SAVE $$ -- AWD -- TURBO BOXER ENGINE -- HEATED FRONT SEATS -- EYESIGHT SAFETY SUITE -- 11.6-INCH TOUCHSCREEN -- WIRELESS CARPLAY/ANDROID AUTO -- TRI-ZONE CLIMATE CONTROL -- POWER REAR GATE -- LED HEADLIGHTS -- SMART DEVICE REMOTE START -- LOW MILES -- 8-PASSENGER --We have on our lot a SHARP-LOOKING, FAMILY READY, 2025 Subaru Ascent Premium SUV  its finished in Crystal Black Silica, paired beautifully with a Warm Ivory spill-resistant cloth interior. This Ascent has only 8,396 miles on it and was previously used as a service loaner, meaning its technically brand new, with the buyer becoming the first registered owner. Youll also benefit from the remaining factory bumper-to-bumper warranty and potential tax savings if you have a trade-in.Under the hood, youll find Subarus robust 2.4L Turbocharged BOXER engine paired with an 8-speed CVT transmission and legendary Symmetrical All-Wheel Drive. Together, they deliver confident control in any weather and impressive fuel efficiencyup to 26 MPG highway and 20 MPG in the city. Whether youre navigating winding mountain roads, wet highways, or snowy driveways, the Ascent inspires confidence with its poised traction and stability.This Premium model is built for families, adventurers, and those who simply crave peace of mind behind the wheel. Inside, its spacious, smartly designed, and incredibly versatile with a three-row layout. Youll appreciate thoughtful touches like tri-zone automatic climate control with rear air vents, heated front seats that bring cozy comfort on winter mornings, and a power rear gate that makes loading groceries or gear effortless.Technology takes center stage with the massive 11.6-inch Subaru Multimedia Plus touchscreen, offering wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, Bluetooth audio streaming, HD Radio, and SiriusXM with 360L. Whether its a road trip playlist or hands-free navigation, everything is at your fingertips. The cabins soft-touch materials, leather-wrapped steering wheel, and intuitive layout give it a refined, upscale feel without sacrificing practicality.Safety, as always with Subaru, is paramount. The Ascent Premium comes equipped with the full suite of Subaru EyeSight Driver Assist Technology. That means Adaptive Cruise Control with Lane Centering, Lane Keep Assist, Pre-Collision Braking, and Emergency Stop Assistall working together to make every drive smoother and safer. Plus, Blind Spot Detection, Rear Cross-Traffic Alert, and Reverse Automatic Braking add extra layers of confidence when maneuvering in tight spaces.With seating for up to eight passengers and 19 cup and bottle holders, the Ascent was designed for family adventures. The 60/40-split second and third rows fold flat to open up a cavernous cargo area, while the all-weather floor liners, cargo tray, and rear bumper protector help keep everything tidy no matter where life takes you. LED Steering Responsive Headlights with High Beam Assist illuminate the road ahead, while raised roof rails make it easy to haul bikes, kayaks, or a rooftop carrier for those long weekend getaways.This Ascent Premium combines capability, comfort, and advanced technology in one confident, family-ready package. Its perfect for those who need space and safety but still want a vehicle that feels agile, premium, and distinctly Subaru. With its low mileage, clean history, and demo status, this Ascent wont be here longso dont wait to experience it in person. description: Bask in the brilliance of the Radiant Red Metallic exterior, turning heads wherever your journey takes you. Indulge in the seamless harmony of the CVT transmission paired with a dynamic 4-cylinder engine, ensuring remarkable efficiency and exhilarating performance. Glide effortlessly through any terrain with the confidence of all-wheel drive, while the sophisticated gray interior envelopes you in modern comfort and luxury.  CarFax No Accidents!  CarFax One Owner!     Popular Options and Features Include: Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.   About Dublin Honda Not only are we Honda enthusiasts at Dublin Honda, we're dedicated members of the local community. Ken Harvey opened Dublin Honda in 1977 and has helped literally thousands upon thousands of Happy Honda Owners find and maintain their Hondas. description: Thank you for stopping by our virtual showroom!  This 2024 Honda Civic Sedan Touring offered in Sonic Gray Pearl will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:  Packages & Features    Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring  OTHER NOTABLE OPTIONS AND FEATURES:      One Owner!    FINANCING OPTIONS: Take advantage of our attractive low-rate financing options. Our access to various Credit Unions and National Banks can provide financing for most credit levels. We can tailor a finance package to fit your needs. To get started, complete our secure online credit application.  To be sure you don't miss out, give us a call at  and schedule a test drive. Safety is a top priority, and the Acadia Elevation delivers with a suite of advanced features. Elevate your driving experience with the 2024 GMC Acadia Elevation. description: Elevate your driving experience with this stunning 2024 Subaru Crosstrek Premium. This versatile crossover SUV is the perfect blend of style, capability, and cutting-edge technology, making it the ultimate companion for your adventures.  Boasting an impressive array of features, this Crosstrek Premium stands out from the crowd. Key highlights include:   Blind Spot Detection with Rear Cross-Traffic Alert  Power Moonroof  All-Weather Package with Heated Exterior Mirrors, Heated Front Seats, and Heated Wipers  10-Way Power Driver's Seat with 2-Way Lumbar Support  The Crosstrek's 2.0L 4-Cylinder DOHC 16V engine, paired with a Lineartronic CVT and Subaru's renowned Symmetrical All-Wheel Drive, delivers an exceptional driving experience. With an EPA-estimated 27 MPG in the city and 34 MPG on the highway, this vehicle offers impressive fuel efficiency to keep you on the road longer.  Stepping inside, you'll be greeted by a spacious and well-appointed cabin, featuring premium cloth upholstery and a STARLINK 11.6" Multimedia Plus System with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration. The 10-way power driver's seat and heated front seats ensure maximum comfort, while the Blind Spot Detection with Rear Cross-Traffic Alert provides added peace of mind on the road.  Versatility is at the heart of the Crosstrek Premium. The 60/40 split-folding rear seats allow you to easily accommodate your cargo needs, while the All-Weather Package keeps you comfortable in any condition. Enjoy the convenience of the power moonroof, which lets you take in the great outdoors with the touch of a button.  Safety is also a top priority in the Crosstrek Premium. This vehicle comes equipped with a comprehensive suite of advanced safety features, including Subaru's STARLINK Safety and Security system, dual front impact airbags, and Electronic Stability Control, ensuring you and your loved ones are well-protected.  With its striking White exterior and an impressive list of features, this 2024 Subaru Crosstrek Premium is a must-see.
